requests.details: Notify Dr. Lee that caller has been feeling dizzy since starting Amlodipine

transcript: Hi, this is Maria Gonzalez, date of birth March 12, 1978. I have Blue Cross PPO and my phone number is 415-555-0101. I need a refill for my Lisinopril. Also, can you please let Dr. Lee know that I have been feeling dizzy since starting the Amlodipine?
